
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Soft Dinner Rolls.
    Summary: Nathan,

I love to use this recipe to make “after thanksgiving” sandwiches. You know the kind with a little of everything on it and somehow it almost tastes better than the day of. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 1 cup milk, 2 ¼ teaspoons yeast, 2 tablespoons sugar, 1  egg, ¼ cup butter, 1 teaspoon salt, 3 cups flour, 2 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoon honey
